name: ATL Gold Buyers
description_short: ATL Gold Buyers is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 4.8/5 with 482 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
ATL Gold Buyers is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. With 482 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, ATL Gold Buyers has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a coin dealer, diamond buyer, jewelry appraiser, ATL Gold Buyers provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. ATL Gold Buyers operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering ATL Gold Buyers should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
